hero.name: Antonio Miguel Apostol
hero.description: I turn raw footage into scroll-stopping, direct-response content - brand ads, podcast clips, UGC, and more, cut fast and built to convert.

about.title: The Creative Strategist Behind the Cut
about.subtitle: A little about how I think, and what I bring to every project.
about.heading: I turn raw footage into results.
about.intro: I'm Antonio, a creative strategist and video editor based in the Philippines. I partner with brands and creators to produce short-form content that doesn't just look good, it performs: higher watch-through, more shares, more conversions. From direct-response ad edits to organic TikTok growth, I bring a strategist's eye to every cut, not just technical polish.

specializations.title: Creative Strategy
specializations.text: Every edit starts with a hook, a structure, and a goal. Not just a timeline of clips.

specializations.title: Video Editing
specializations.text: Fluent in CapCut, sharpening my craft in Premiere Pro and After Effects daily.

specializations.title: Fast Turnaround
specializations.text: Quick, reliable delivery so your content calendar never has to wait on me.

whyChooseMe.title: Why Choose Me
whyChooseMe.subtitle: What working with me actually looks like, in four points.

items.title: Proven Outcomes
items.text: From viral short-form clips to full episodes, my edits are proven to amplify your authority and turn passive viewers into engaged clients.

items.title: Fast Turnaround
items.text: Quick, reliable delivery so your content stays timely and your posting schedule never slips.

items.title: Full-Stack Toolkit
items.text: Fluent across CapCut, Premiere Pro, After Effects, and AI tools like ElevenLabs and HeyGen.

items.title: Premium Quality, Fair Pricing
items.text: Agency-level output without the agency overhead - pricing that scales with the project, not padded fees.
